# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source is an institute-worthy preprint with real experimental results.

## Why

The source is a research manuscript on arXiv and the excerpt shows a concrete 3×3 controlled study over write strategies and retrieval methods, evaluated on LoCoMo with 1,540 non-adversarial questions. It reports specific measured outcomes, including accuracy ranges, stage-level failure analysis, and explicit method/cost tradeoffs. That is real empirical substance, not commentary or theorycraft.

## Limits
